_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
procedure_name: Linear Accelerator, External Beam Radiotherapy 3D CRT (60-64Gy/30-32 fractions @ 2Gy per fraction)
min_doctor_qualification: MD or DNB (Radiation oncology) or equivalent
clinical_indications: Non-metastatic osteosarcoma where limb sparing resection is not possible, lesions are centro-axial in location (followed by adjuvant CT)
Metastatic osteosarcoma which are multiple/ bilateral &/ or inoperable / non-pulmonary metastasis

preauth.label: Clinical notes with documentation of relevant history
Details of RT treatment plan including Suggested dosage (As per table above)
Serological investigations- alkaline phosphatase, lactate dehydrogenase

claim.label: Detailed Discharge Summary (with RT treatment and doses given)

ppd_preauth.q: Increased levels of alkaline phosphatase and Lactate dehydrogenase?
Local part X-Ray/MRI/ Bone scan/ PET-CT shows osteosarcoma?
Biopsy report shows High Grade osteosarcoma?

common_queries: Increased levels of alkaline phosphatase and Lactate dehydrogenase not documented or outside expected range
Local part X-Ray/MRI/ Bone scan/ PET-CT does not show osteosarcoma
Biopsy report does not show High Grade osteosarcoma
Clinical notes with relevant history are missing or incomplete at pre-authorization
RT treatment plan or suggested dosage is missing or incomplete at pre-authorization
Detailed Discharge Summary (with RT treatment and doses given) is missing or incomplete at claim submission
Poor wound healing or poor general condition

additional_information.special_empanelment: Chemotherapy unit (adequate infrastructure for drug level monitoring especially for MAP regimen i.e. adequate facilities for admission for every cycle and adequate facilities to monitor serum methotrexate levels and to manage renal toxicities); LINEAC; well-equipped OT
additional_information.post_op_care: Physiotherapy rehabilitation post-operatively, follow-up every 6 months for first 5 years and annual follow-up after every 5 years with clinical evaluation (examination of local area), radiological evaluation (X-ray of the local part and Chest) and functional evaluation (using special scores like Musculoskeletal Tumor Society (MSTS) scoring, etc.)
